query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `email_settings` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `key` varchar(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `value` longtext NOT NULL,
  `description` longtext,
  `isEncrypted` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

INSERT INTO `email_settings` (`key`, `value`, `description`, `isEncrypted`) VALUES
('performance_monitoring_email', 'abdullah.er@kebanet.com', 'Performance Monitoring mail gönderilecek adres', false),
('performance_monitoring_template', 'Performans İzleme Formu başarıyla kaydedilmiştir.', 'Performance Monitoring mail şablonu', false)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = VALUES(`value`);
